hero.title: Cover Letter Writer
hero.description: Prepare focused cover letters that connect your experience to each opportunity.

differences.title: A stronger letter for every application
differences.description: Create relevant cover letters without starting from a blank page each time.

items.title: Role context
items.description: Keep the letter focused on the opportunity and its requirements.

items.title: Relevant experience
items.description: Connect your strongest qualifications to the role.

items.title: Clear structure
items.description: Build a concise letter with a professional flow.

feel.title: Focused writing with a clear starting point
feel.description: The workflow helps turn application context into a polished draft.

items.title: Set the context
items.description: Capture the role, company, and relevant details.

items.title: Shape the message
items.description: Connect your experience to the opportunity.

items.title: Refine the draft
items.description: Review tone, clarity, and final details before using the letter.

audiences.title: Who uses Cover Letter Writer
audiences.description: Useful for applicants who want each letter to feel intentional.

items.title: Students
items.description: Prepare letters for internships and entry-level roles.

items.title: Professionals
items.description: Present relevant experience for career moves.

resourceSection.title: Works with your career materials
resourceSection.description: Keep the cover letter aligned with the rest of your application.

items.title: Resume context
items.description: Use relevant experience and achievements as supporting evidence.

items.title: Role requirements
items.description: Connect qualifications to the needs of the opportunity.

items.title: Reusable drafts
items.description: Maintain a useful starting point for future applications.

groupedSection.title: Build a complete letter
groupedSection.description: Organize the message around the details hiring teams need.

items.name: Opportunity
items.description: Identify the role and reason for applying.

items.name: Value
items.description: Introduce the strongest reason you fit the role.

items.name: Experience
items.description: Connect relevant work and achievements to the role.

items.name: Closing
items.description: Finish with a clear and professional next step.

technicalSection.title: Built for reusable application drafts
technicalSection.description: Cover Letter Writer follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.

finalCta.title: Ready to prepare your next cover letter?
finalCta.description: Open Cover Letter Writer and start with the opportunity you are applying for.
